lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਵਹਿ ਸੇ ਗੁਣੀ ਗਹੀਰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasangat mil har raveh se gunee gaheer |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Those who join the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, and dwell upon the Lord, find the Ocean of virtue. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਬਿਸਰੈ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਤਾਹੂ ਕਉ ਪੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau bisarai raam naam taahoo kau peer |
lines.english: One who forgets the Lord's Name, suffers in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ₂ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree₂ mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜਾਨਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਧਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: jo jaaneh har prabh dhanee |
lines.english: Those who know the Lord God as their Master,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੈ ਕਰ ਤਲ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਸਿਧਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: taa kai kar tal nav nidh sidh |1|
lines.english: hold the nine treasures, and the miraculous spiritual powers of the Siddhas in the palms of their hands. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਬੁਧਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau guramukh ridai budh |
lines.english: Those Gurmukhs whose hearts are filled with wisdom,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣੈਹਾਰੁ ਪਛਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: karanaihaar pachhaaniaa |
lines.english: Those who realize the Creator Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਸੂਖ ਰੰਗ ਮਾਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sarab sookh rang maaniaa |3|
lines.english: enjoy all peace and pleasure. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਵਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: har dhan jaa kai grihi vasai |
lines.english: Those whose inner homes are filled with the Lord's wealth

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਛੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਕਮੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kichh naahee taa kai kamee |2|
lines.english: do not lack anything. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਨਸੈ ॥੪॥੯॥੧੪੭॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak tin sang dukh nasai |4|9|147|
lines.english: - says Nanak, in their company, pain departs. ||4||9||147||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਰਬੁ ਬਡੋ ਮੂਲੁ ਇਤਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: garab baddo mool itano |
lines.english: Your pride is so great, but what about your origins?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਰ ਜੂਆਰ ਜੂਆ ਬਿਧੇ ਇੰਦ੍ਰੀ ਵਸਿ ਲੈ ਜਿਤਨੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: haar jooaar jooaa bidhe indree vas lai jitano |1|
lines.english: Like the gambler losing the game of chance, you are held in the power of sensory desires. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਹਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਗਹੁ ਕਿਤਨੋ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: rehan nahee gahu kitano |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You cannot remain, no matter how much you try to hold on. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਬਰਜਤ ਬੇਦ ਸੰਤਨਾ ਉਆਹੂ ਸਿਉ ਰੇ ਹਿਤਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: bebarajat bed santanaa uaahoo siau re hitano |
lines.english: That which is forbidden by the Vedas and the Saints - with that, you are in love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਉਧਰੇ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਨਿਧਿ ਮੈ ਦਿਤਨੋ ॥੨॥੧੦॥੧੪੮॥
lines.translit: naanak udhare saadhasang kirapaa nidh mai ditano |2|10|148|
lines.english: O Nanak, I have been saved, in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. I have been blessed by the Treasure of Mercy. ||2||10||148||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਨ ਭਰਨ ਸੰਪੂਰਨਾ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਿਤਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: haran bharan sanpooranaa charan kamal rang ritano |
lines.english: The One who is All-powerful to empty out and fill up - you have no love for His Lotus Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ₃ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree₃ mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਿ ਦਾਸਰੋ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਕੋ ॥
lines.translit: mohi daasaro tthaakur ko |
lines.english: I am the slave of my Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮੁ ਕਰੀ ਜੇ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਭਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaam karee je tthaakur bhaavaa |
lines.english: I do that work which pleases my Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਸਾਜਿ ਸਵਾਰਣਹਾਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: khin meh saaj savaaranahaaraa |1|
lines.english: In an instant, He creates and embellishes. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਾ ਖਾਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dhaan prabh kaa khaanaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I eat whatever God gives me. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੋ ਹੈ ਰੇ ਖਸਮੁ ਹਮਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: aiso hai re khasam hamaaraa |
lines.english: Such is my Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਣਿ ਪਰਿਓ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਵਜੀਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: saran pario tthaakur vajeeraa |
lines.english: I seek the Sanctuary of the Lord's Prime Minister;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਾ ਦੇਖਿ ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਧੀਰਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tinaa dekh meraa man dheeraa |3|
lines.english: beholding Him, my mind is comforted and consoled. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੀਤ ਚਰਿਤ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: geet charit prabh ke gun gaavaa |2|
lines.english: I sing the songs of God's glory, and His wondrous play. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਲਾਗਾ ਕਾਰਾ ॥੪॥੧੧॥੧੪੯॥
lines.translit: jan naanak har kee laagaa kaaraa |4|11|149|
lines.english: Servant Nanak is engaged in the Lord's work. ||4||11||149||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਟੇਕ ਏਕੋ ਆਧਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: ek ttek eko aadhaaraa |
lines.english: The One Lord is my support, the One is my steady anchor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੈ ਕੋਈ ਐਸਾ ਹਉਮੈ ਤੋਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: hai koee aisaa haumai torai |
lines.english: Is there anyone, who can shatter his ego,

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਮੀਠੀ ਤੇ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਹੋਰੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: eis meetthee te ihu man horai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: and turn his mind away from this sweet Maya? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਮਾਨੁਖੁ ਭਇਆ ਜੋ ਨਾਹੀ ਸੋ ਲੋਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: agiaanee maanukh bheaa jo naahee so lorai |
lines.english: Humanity is in spiritual ignorance; people see things that do not exist.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੈਣਿ ਅੰਧਾਰੀ ਕਾਰੀਆ ਕਵਨ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਜਿਤੁ ਭੋਰੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: rain andhaaree kaareea kavan jugat jit bhorai |1|
lines.english: The night is dark and gloomy; how will the morning dawn? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮਤੋ ਭ੍ਰਮਤੋ ਹਾਰਿਆ ਅਨਿਕ ਬਿਧੀ ਕਰਿ ਟੋਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: bhramato bhramato haariaa anik bidhee kar ttorai |
lines.english: Wandering, wandering all around, I have grown weary; trying all sorts of things, I have been searching.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਭਈ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਨਿਧਿ ਮੋਰੈ ॥੨॥੧੨॥੧੫੦॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak kirapaa bhee saadhasangat nidh morai |2|12|150|
lines.english: Says Nanak, He has shown mercy to me; I have found the treasure of the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||2||12||150||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿੰਤਾਮਣਿ ਕਰੁਣਾ ਮਏ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: chintaaman karunaa me |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He is the Wish-fulfilling Jewel, the Embodiment of Mercy. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲਾ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ॥ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਸਿਮਰਣਿ ਸੁਖ ਭਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: deen deaalaa paarabraham | jaa kai simaran sukh bhe |1|
lines.english: The Supreme Lord God is Merciful to the meek; Meditating in remembrance on Him, peace is obtained. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਾਲ ਪੁਰਖ ਅਗਾਧਿ ਬੋਧ ॥ ਸੁਨਤ ਜਸੋ ਕੋਟਿ ਅਘ ਖਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: akaal purakh agaadh bodh | sunat jaso kott agh khe |2|
lines.english: The Wisdom of the Undying Primal Being is beyond comprehension. Hearing His Praises, millions of sins are erased. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਪਾ ਨਿਧਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਇਆ ਧਾਰਿ ॥ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਲਏ ॥੩॥੧੩॥੧੫੧॥
lines.translit: kirapaa nidh prabh meaa dhaar | naanak har har naam le |3|13|151|
lines.english: O God, Treasure of Mercy, please bless Nanak with Your kindness, that he may repeat the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||3||13||151||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਪੂਰਬੀ₄ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree poorabee₄ mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Gauree Poorbee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਦਿਨਿ ਬਿਸਰੈ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਸੋ ਦਿਨੁ ਜਾਤ ਅਜਾਏ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa din bisarai praan sukhadaataa so din jaat ajaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: That day, when the Giver of life and peace is forgotten - that day passes uselessly. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਸਰਣਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: mere man saran prabhoo sukh paae |
lines.english: O my mind, in the Sanctuary of God, peace is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਰੈਣ ਕੇ ਪਾਹੁਨ ਤੁਮ ਆਏ ਬਹੁ ਜੁਗ ਆਸ ਬਧਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: ek rain ke paahun tum aae bahu jug aas badhaae |
lines.english: You have come as a guest for one short night, and yet you hope to live for many ages.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਮੰਦਰ ਸੰਪੈ ਜੋ ਦੀਸੈ ਜਿਉ ਤਰਵਰ ਕੀ ਛਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: grih mandar sanpai jo deesai jiau taravar kee chhaae |1|
lines.english: Households, mansions and wealth - whatever is seen, is like the shade of a tree. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਸੰਪੈ ਸਭ ਮੇਰੀ ਬਾਗ ਮਿਲਖ ਸਭ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: tan meraa sanpai sabh meree baag milakh sabh jaae |
lines.english: My body, wealth, and all my gardens and property shall all pass away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵਨਹਾਰਾ ਬਿਸਰਿਓ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਹੋਤ ਪਰਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: devanahaaraa bisario tthaakur khin meh hot paraae |2|
lines.english: You have forgotten your Lord and Master, the Great Giver. In an instant, these shall belong to somebody else. ||2||
